title: Paycheck deductions
description: Practice identifying paycheck deductions (statutory vs voluntary) and practice calculating gross and net pay

assessment_items.question_content:
Riqui's weekly pay stub is shown below.

Description | Amount
-|-
Gross pay| $?$ 
Taxes | $\$350$ 
401(k) | $\$100$ 
Health insurance | $\$50$ 
**Net pay** | $\$1{,}100$ 

**What is Riqui's gross pay?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Here is the pay stub for Susan:

Description | Amount
-|-
Gross pay| $?$ 
Taxes | $\$250$ 
401(k) | $\$100$ 
Health insurance | $\$50$ 
**Net pay** | $\$950$ 

**What is Susan's gross pay?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Here is your pay stub:

Description | Amount
-|-
Gross pay| $?$ 
Taxes | $\$300$ 
401(k) | $\$100$ 
Health insurance | $\$50$ 
**Net pay** | $\$850$ 

**What is your gross pay?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Here is a breakdown of Mateo's gross pay, taxes, and any other benefits he selected.

 Description | Amount 
-|-
Gross pay| $\$2{,}000$  
Taxes | $\$300$ 
401(k) | $\$200$ 
Health insurance | $\$75$ 
**Net pay** | $?$

**Based on this information, what is Mateo's net pay?**

401(k) | $\$200$

Taxes | $\$200$ 
401(k) | $\$150$ 
Health insurance | $\$75$ 
**Net pay** | $?$

**What is Xiaoli's net pay?**
